title: PACK N TRADE White 10 Inch Cake Box, Pack of 5 Square Cardboard Cake Boxes with Lids (10 x 10 x 6 Inches), Ideal for Safely Carrying and Transporting Cakes
features: 【Premium Quality】- These 10inch cake box with Lids, featuring dimensions of 10 x 10 x 6 Inches, are made of thick, premium cardboard to keep your delicious Cakes fresh and moist until they're ready to eat.

【Sturdy Cake Carriers 】- Our cake box 10 inch feature a reinforced structure that ensures durability, making them perfect for safely transporting cakes. Whether used in professional bakeries or for homemade treats, our boxes provide reliability and peace of mind, ensuring cakes arrive securely at their destination.

【Best for Special Occasions】- These white cake box are designed to make special events even more memorable. They are ideal for occasions such as Christmas, weddings, and birthday parties, as well as for bakeries, events, gifting, and home baking enthusiasts.

【Elegant White Exterior】- The white exterior of our box for cake provides a clean and polished appearance, enhancing the presentation of your cakes. It ensures a professional look that is suitable for any occasion, from casual gatherings to formal events.
【Easy to Assemble】- The precise notch facilitates easy and quick folding and assembly of the large cake box, ensuring hassle-free packaging for cakes of different designs.
